---
title: "Data Analysis"
---

The data-analysis page tracks finite phase-coordinate proofs and exploratory benchmark fixtures for periodic synthetic data. The first fixture compares coil closure ranking with an autocorrelation baseline on a deterministic known-period signal; it is not a real-data usefulness claim.

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="APPD-T0001"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="APPD-T0002"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="APPD-T0003"></div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
